steps.title: Identify the singular antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun refers to the film described as “the feature-length romance”—singular.

steps.title: Select the matching pronoun
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: pronoun-antecedent agreement. Rule: a pronoun must match its antecedent in number.
  • Choice A — "it": singular pronoun; matches singular antecedent "the feature-length romance." ✓
  • Choice B — "those": plural pronoun; disagrees with a singular antecedent. ✗
  • Choice C — "these": plural pronoun; disagrees with a singular antecedent. ✗
  • Choice D — "them": plural pronoun; disagrees with a singular antecedent. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
